[Who Is Alicia Lyttle? | The Queen of AI Helping Entrepreneurs Use AI to Scale](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iPAH3HKJM4g)

•

•

486,733 views
1 month ago

Meet Alicia Lyttle — TEDx Speaker, Author of "ChatGPT Made Easy," and the woman known as "The Queen of AI."
For over a decade, Alicia has been training entrepreneurs, creators, and professionals across 6 continents to use artificial intelligence to scale their businesses and future-proof their careers — no tech degree required.
On this channel you'll get:
✅ Step-by-step AI tutorials you can implement TODAY
✅ Real-world strategies from industry leaders
✅ Clear guidance through the AI noise
✅ Tools that actually work for your business
────────────────────────────

Content is more than just posting consistently or chasing trends. It’s about clarity, intention, and understanding what you’re working towards.
I’ll be joining the Content to Commas Summit as a guest speaker to share how I approach content as a tool for structure, alignment, and long-term growth - not just visibility.
📅 Feb 6 | 12PM EST
📅 Feb 7 | 10AM EST
🔗 ContentToCommasSummit.com
If you’re ready for a more thoughtful way forward, I’ll see you there.

🎙️ Happening TODAY on The Tavis Smiley Show.
I’m sitting down with The Tavis Smiley Show to unpack how AI infrastructure is showing up in Black communities - and why staying skilled, informed, and adaptable matters more than ever in this moment.
AI is moving fast. People deserve to move with it, not be sidelined by it.
🕚 11:00am–11:30am PST
🎧 Catch it live or wherever you get your podcasts
[#AliciaLyttle](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/alicialyttle) [#QueenOfAI](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/queenofai) [#TavisSmiley](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/tavissmiley) [#AIAndEquity](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/aiandequity) [#FutureOfWork](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/futureofwork) [#AILeadership](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/aileadership) [#BlackTech](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/blacktech)

⏰ 8:30 AM ET
Set your alarms! I’ll see you bright and early.
